FO-Ia-1.content: Fundamental Operations on Fractions, Decimals, Percentage
FO-Ia-1.content_standard: The learners demonstrate an understanding of: 1. fractions 2. decimals and percentage
FO-Ia-1.performance_standard: The learners are able to: 1. Perform operations: addition, subtraction, multiplication and division accurately 2. Solve problems involving fractions, decimals and percent related to business
FO-Ia-1.learning_competency: Perform fundamental operations on fractions and decimals.

FO-Ia-2.content: Fundamental Operations on Fractions, Decimals, Percentage
FO-Ia-2.content_standard: The learners demonstrate an understanding of: 1. fractions 2. decimals and percentage
FO-Ia-2.performance_standard: The learners are able to: 1. Perform operations: addition, subtraction, multiplication and division accurately
FO-Ia-2.learning_competency: Express fractions to decimals and percent forms and vice versa.

BS-Ig-1.content_standard: The learners demonstrate an understanding of: 1. mark-on, mark-down and mark-up 2. profit margin 3. break-even point
BS-Ig-1.performance_standard: The learners are able to: 1. Analyze and solve problems on mark-up, mark-down, and mark-on, and compute profit margin and break-even point

BS-Ij-8.content_standard: The learners demonstrate an understanding of break-even point
BS-Ij-8.performance_standard: The learners are able to illustrate how to determine break-even point
BS-Ij-8.learning_competency: Define break-even; illustrate how to determine break-even point.

SW-IIc-1.content_standard: The learners demonstrate an understanding of salary, wage, income, and benefits
SW-IIc-1.performance_standard: The learners are able to compute gross and net earnings

PAD-IIh-5.topic: Presentation and Analysis of Business Data
PAD-IIh-5.content: Presentation and Analysis of Business Data
PAD-IIh-5.content_standard: The learners demonstrate an understanding of measures of central tendency and variability
PAD-IIh-5.performance_standard: The learners are able to analyze and interpret business data using statistical tools
PAD-IIh-5.learning_competency: Analyze and interpret the data presented in the table using measures of central tendency and variability.
